visual_summary: A subterranean mountain cave characterized by narrow passages that transition into larger chambers. The environment is filled with a pungent, tenuous vapor and contains shadowy recesses and claustrophobic stone walls. A lifeless physical body occupies the floor space.
layout_notes: Narrow passages transitioning to larger chambers; includes shadowy recesses and claustrophobic stone walls.
lighting: Dimly lit with oppressive darkness in the depths.
mood: Oppressive, pungent, and heavy with an unseen moaning sound.
constraints: Must maintain claustrophobic stone wall geometry
Presence of a lifeless physical body on the floor
unresolved_ambiguities: Specific nature/source of the "unseen, moaning sound"
